recommendations.title: After.Life
recommendations.overview: Following a terrible car crash, a woman awakes to find an enigmatic mortician preparing her for burial.

recommendations.title: Shirley
recommendations.overview: A famous horror writer finds inspiration for her next book after she and her husband take in a young couple.

recommendations.title: Fahim
recommendations.overview: Fahim Mohammad, a Bangladeshi immigrant, becomes a world junior chess champion in France.

recommendations.title: The Wise Guys
recommendations.overview: Hector Valentin returns to France from Canada when he inherits a small sawmill. He has difficulties restarting the run-down operation which has inefficient workers and is hampered by the dirty tactics of its bigger...

recommendations.title: Dersu Uzala
recommendations.overview: A military explorer meets and befriends a Goldi man in Russia’s unmapped forests. A deep and abiding bond evolves between the two men, one civilized in the usual sense, the other at home in the glacial Siberian woods.

recommendations.title: In Darkness We Fall
recommendations.overview: Three boys and two girls go backpacking from the city to a paradisiacal island. There they rent motorcycles, travel around the prettiest and most remote spots, camp out in the woods, on a coastal cliff, get drunk and swim in the sea. The following da

recommendations.title: The Walking Dead: The Return
recommendations.overview: Stars of "The Walking Dead," Andrew Lincoln and Danai Gurira, walk down memory lane and visit iconic locations where pivotal moments between their characters, Rick and Michonne, were filmed.

recommendations.title: Serial Teachers 2
recommendations.overview: The worst teachers of France landed in England for an ultra-secret mission. With Boulard, the King of the Dunces, they are parachuted in the best school of the country, and they will apply their famous methods on the future of the nation.

recommendations.title: Greater
recommendations.overview: The incredible true story of the greatest walk-on in the history of college football.

recommendations.title: Hotel Rwanda
recommendations.overview: Inspired by true events, this film takes place in Rwanda in the 1990s when more than a million Tutsis were killed in a genocide that went mostly unnoticed by the rest of the world. Hotel owner Paul Rusesabagina houses over a thousand refuges in his h
